evals.prompt: Find hotels near the FIFA World Cup stadiums in the US this summer and put the best options on a Google Map.
evals.expected_output: Uses fifa-stadium-hotel-planner, pulls routed x402 Fanfare World Cup context, loops through U.S. World Cup 26 venues, gathers nearby hotels with routed MPP maps/reviews, and outputs a map-ready CSV or GeoJSON plus hotel shortlist.
assertions: calls or references routed x402 Fanfare World Cup context
calls routed MPP Serper or Google Maps steps
uses the U.S. venue table or equivalent venue list
returns hotel candidates with coordinates and review/rating signals
produces Google Maps or Google My Maps-ready pin output

evals.prompt: For the World Cup final at MetLife, show me nearby hotel options, reviews, walking distance, and a map preview.
evals.expected_output: Runs the skill for MetLife Stadium / New York New Jersey Stadium, calls Fanfare routed x402 for match/trip context plus routed MPP hotel search, review, distance, and map steps, then summarizes the best hotels.
assertions: venue_query is set to MetLife Stadium East Rutherford NJ or equivalent
Fanfare routed x402 is part of the plan
calls Serper Maps or Places for hotel candidates
calls a review endpoint for selected hotels
uses distance or route data to score convenience

evals.prompt: Brainstorm endpoints for a FIFA trip planner: flights, hotels, weather, restaurant discovery, and stadium commute planning.
evals.expected_output: Uses the endpoint brainstorm reference and groups endpoints by routed x402 World Cup bundle, flights, lodging, maps/routes, weather, local discovery, reviews, and social/event pulse.
assertions: mentions Fanfare routed x402 World Cup bundle
mentions review or hotel scraping endpoints

evals.prompt: Write a React component for a login form with email and password validation.
Summarize today's ETH price action and on-chain wallet flows.
